_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Context, problem and option analysis involves holistically investigating the context for a piece of work to define the problem or opportunity, understand root causes, identify high level business and user needs and shape the work to address those needs.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, including scoping, methodology selection, execution, and executive-level communication of findings.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AB-T-009 (AB, cosine: 0.375), AB-T-010 (AB, cosine: 0.370).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.0/10 (raw 0.398). Shared vocabulary: [level]. DDaT-only terms [address, analysis, business, causes, context, define] vs WIDAI-only terms [analytical, communication, complex, designing, executing, execution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.843, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 39-word DDaT element and 19-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (98.6%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Context, problem and option analysis involves holistically investigating the con" and "Skill in designing and executing complex analytical projects independently, incl". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.433 ≈ STS 0.398 (gap 0.035). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [level] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.5%. Shared tokens: [level]. DDaT-only: [address, analysis, business, causes, context, define]. WIDAI-only: [analytical, communication, complex, designing, executing, execution].
